prestazioni: Engine swap to a **Ford 4.0L Cologne V6 (engine code: 4.0L SOHC, internal code: 40T)** with forged internals (Manley forged pistons, Eagle H-beam rods, and a billet crankshaft) paired with a **Garrett GT3582R turbocharger** (0.82 A/R turbine housing) and a **Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate** for precise boost control. Supporting mods include a **Holley Sniper EFI throttle body injection system** with a **Megasquirt MS3Pro ECU** for standalone tuning, and a **Pacesetter headers** 4-2-1 exhaust manifold feeding into a **Borla Pro XS 3.5" cat-back exhaust** with dual 4" rolled-edge tips.

Suspension overhaul with **Bilstein B16 PSS9 coilovers** (adjustable damping and ride height) paired with **Eibach Pro-Kit lowering springs** (1.5" drop) and **Whiteline adjustable sway bars** (24mm front, 22mm rear) to reduce body roll. Chassis reinforcement includes **Cusco front and rear strut tower bars** and a **Mazdaspeed 4-point roll cage** for rigidity. Braking is upgraded to **Wilwood Dynalite 6-piston front calipers** with **13" two-piece rotors** and **Hawk HT-10 brake pads**, paired with **Goodridge G-Stop braided stainless steel brake lines**.

Drivetrain upgrades include a **Centerforce DFX dual-friction clutch** with a **Mazdaspeed lightweight flywheel** for faster revving, paired with a **Tremec TKO-600 5-speed manual transmission** (2.87:1 first gear ratio). The rear differential is swapped for a **Ford 8.8" limited-slip differential** with **3.73:1 gearing** and **Motive Gear 31-spline axles** for durability. A **Quaife ATB helical differential** is added for improved torque distribution, and the driveshaft is replaced with a **Driveshaft Shop aluminum 1350-series unit** to handle increased power.
estetica: Widebody conversion using a **Rocket Bunny V1 (PB-001) kit** for the B2600, featuring extended fenders (2.5" wider front, 3" wider rear), custom front bumper with integrated **Seibon carbon fiber splitter**, and a **Voltex Type-3 rear wing** (adjustable angle, 3-piece construction). The kit includes **custom aluminum overfenders** and **polyurethane side skirts** for a seamless fit.

Exterior lighting upgraded to **Morimoto XB LED headlights** (projector-style, 5500K color temperature) with **Diode Dynamics SS3 Pro LED fog lights** and **Anzo USA LED taillights** (smoked lenses, sequential turn signals). The grille is replaced with a **custom mesh grille** (black powder-coated, 3mm bar spacing) and a **Mazdaspeed front emblem delete plate**. Wheels are **Work Emotion CR Kiwami** (17x9 +22 front, 17x10.5 +25 rear) wrapped in **Toyo R888R tires** (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear).

Interior stripped and rebuilt with **Recaro SRD racing seats** (fixed-back, FIA-approved) mounted on **Sparco Pro 2000 seat sliders**, paired with a **NRG Innovations quick-release steering wheel** (350mm, suede) and a **Momo Prototipo shift knob** (short-throw, weighted). The dashboard is replaced with a **Defi BF gauges** (oil pressure, boost, wideband AFR) and a **AEM X-Series digital dash** (7" touchscreen). Sound deadening is removed, and the cabin is fitted with **Dynamat Xtreme** for heat insulation, while the roll cage is wrapped in **Takata 4-point harnesses** (SFI-rated).
